author: waynedane
text: Hi, does flair use WordPiece tokenizer when using BERT embedding?

author: waynedane
text:
> We use the `BertTokenizer` from [`pytorch-pretrained-BERT`](https://github.com/huggingface/pytorch-pretrained-BERT) here:
>
> <https://github.com/zalandoresearch/flair/blob/master/flair/embeddings.py#L1099>

thanks!
